name: Try Not To Plummet
short_description: Determination, a jetpack and a dream of returning home is all you have against the might of Mt. Cadere. There is a high chance that you'll plummet back down to the depths, but don't lose hope! Keep climbing using what little fuel you have, or you might just end up like the others on the mountain...
detailed_description:
Climb, Plummet, Repeat.

Are you sure you're up to the challenge?

What is this game about?

Try Not To Plummet is a tough as nails platformer inspired by the likes of Getting Over it by Bennett Foddy and similar games in the "foddian" genre. It is designed to be as unforgiving as possible, with multiple obstacles and pitfalls created to test the wills of even the most seasoned of hardcore gamers.

Armed only with determination, a jetpack and a dream of returning home, you must muster the courage and perseverance to climb the treacherous cliffs of Mt. Cadere. Using what little fuel you have left in sparing bursts to conquer the mountain and return home.

Features List!

The game will include the following features at launch:

  • Base Game: Climb your way up Mt. Cadere, return home and conquer the mountain!

  • Custom Level Editor: Create your own levels to challenge yourself!

  • Custom Level Exporter/Importer: Export and Import your custom made levels to challenge your friends!

  • Challenge Modes: Play through the base game with special modifiers included! Including a hardcore game mode!
